events.title: A familiar face downstairs
events.text: A neighbor you often greet suggests sharing a coffee instead of another hallway wave.

choices.label: Make time for coffee
choices.outcome: One cup becomes an easy afternoon of conversation.

choices.label: Suggest another day
choices.outcome: You exchange numbers, though the plan remains unwritten.

choices.label: Keep things neighborly
choices.outcome: The hallway waves remain friendly and brief.

events.title: A friend needs a hand
events.text: A friend calls with a stressful, inconvenient request that really cannot wait.

choices.label: Show up and help
choices.outcome: It takes most of the day. Your friend will remember that you came.

choices.label: Offer a smaller kind of help
choices.outcome: It is not everything they hoped for, but it makes the problem lighter.

choices.label: Say you cannot this time
choices.outcome: The boundary is honest, even if the silence afterward is awkward.

events.title: Messages left unread
events.text: A once-close friendship has become a trail of delayed replies and plans that never happen.

choices.label: Ask what has changed
choices.outcome: The conversation is uncomfortable, honest, and worth having.

choices.label: Give the friendship room
choices.outcome: Not every season of a friendship has to look the same.

choices.label: Let the connection fade
choices.outcome: The ending is quiet, with no villain and no final speech.

events.title: An unexpectedly long conversation
events.text: You meet someone whose stories keep the evening moving long after you planned to leave.

choices.label: Exchange numbers
choices.outcome: A new message arrives before you are even home.

choices.label: Keep it friendly
choices.outcome: The spark settles into an easy new friendship.

choices.label: Enjoy the moment and say goodnight
choices.outcome: Some lovely conversations are complete exactly as they are.

events.title: Keys on the table
events.text: Your partner suggests building a more shared life: one home, two sets of keys, many decisions.

choices.label: Choose the shared chapter
choices.outcome: The first night is boxes, takeaway food, and a feeling of arrival.

choices.label: Ask for more time
choices.outcome: The question remains open without becoming an ultimatum.

choices.label: Say this is not the future you want
choices.outcome: Honesty closes one future before resentment can build inside it.

events.title: A future with one more chair
events.text: The possibility of raising a child stops being abstract. It is time for a real conversation.

choices.label: Grow the family
choices.outcome: After months of plans and surprises, a new person joins your story.

choices.label: Wait for a steadier moment
choices.outcome: The decision is not no; it is not yet.

choices.label: Choose a different kind of future
choices.outcome: The shared picture changes, but remains full of possibility.

events.title: The long table
events.text: A family gathering brings old stories, changed faces, and at least one debate nobody needed to restart.

choices.label: Sit with the storytellers
choices.outcome: You hear a family story that somehow never reached you before.

choices.label: Help in the kitchen
choices.outcome: The best conversations happen while drying plates.

choices.label: Leave before the debate returns
choices.outcome: You preserve a pleasant afternoon by ending it on time.

events.title: A role quietly reverses
events.text: A parent admits that everyday tasks are becoming harder and asks for more support.

choices.label: Make regular time to help
choices.outcome: The schedule is demanding, but the shared hours become meaningful.

choices.label: Arrange practical support
choices.outcome: Professional help protects both their independence and your relationship.

choices.label: Share the work with family
choices.outcome: The plan is imperfect, but nobody has to carry it alone.
